name: avengers
description: 112 A-prefixed skills. An Avengers-inspired skill pack for problem solving, invention, leadership, pressure handling, strategy, iteration, and source-grounded reasoning.

interface.shortDescription: 112 A-prefixed skills for Avengers-style operating modes.
interface.longDescription: Avengers turns problem solving, invention, leadership, pressure handling, strategy, iteration, MCU story analysis, and source-grounded reasoning into portable local skills with a lightweight memory layer for setup, compound learning, refresh reports, context, and handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Use $a-stark-router to choose the right Avengers skill.
